pages.text:
Buying guide
BILLY
Bookcase series


Safety
Secure It! Prevent tip-over
injury. Furniture with included
restraints must be secured to the
wall according to the assembly
instructions.

Different wall materials require
different types of hardware.
Use hardware (sold separately)
suitable for the walls in your
home.

Tempered glass should be
handled with care! A damaged
edge or a scratched surface can
cause the glass to break suddenly.
However, it will only break into
small pieces, never into sharp
fragments.


                          Storage for all occasions and needs
                            BILLY bookcase is a beloved icon that never goes out of style. Thanks
                             to its versatility you can use it in many different ways at home -
                             regardless of whether you store books or everyday items in it. A single
                               unit can be enough, but you can also add more bookcases, extension
                              units and shelves to create a larger and more personal combination.
                            BILLY is available in different heights, widths, and expressions so you
                          can always find a storage solution that suits you and your home!

                           Better and better, day by day
                            BILLY was launched in 1979 and is just as popular today. We're
                             constantly working to make the series even better, more relevant
                        and more useful. Some changes, like new wooden expressions, you
                          see right away. Others take longer to discover, for example that BILLY
                                      is made of high-quality paper foil and that the back panel fixes in
                             place with snap fittings. This makes it easy to assemble and
                            disassemble, so you can bring it when moving and continue to enjoy
                          your BILLY for years.


Not all products may be available in all stores. See what is available at your local store by visiting

Combinations


BILLY/HÖGBO Bookcase with glass doors                         BILLY Bookcase
HÖGBO glass doors let you display your favorite items while           Display your favorite books! Two bookcases may be all you need
protecting them from dust. You can also use the doors with the        - or the perfect foundation to build on when your library grows.
included panel or put photos, fabric or wallpaper between the          Overall size: 63×11×791⁄2"
glass and the panel. Place the solution in your living room or in        This combination: 790.178.37
the dining area to enjoy beautiful and functional storage.
Overall size: 311⁄2×113⁄4×791⁄2"
This combination: 794.836.13


BILLY/OXBERG Bookcase with panel doors                        BILLY Bookcase with extension units
A wide horizontal solution with open shelves in the middle and        BILLY bookcase is an expert when it comes to books. With
closed storage with OXBERG panel doors on the sides. Great to        extension units you maximize your vertical storage space
use as a sideboard to display nice items on top.                   and add a clean look to the room that puts your books in
Overall size: 941⁄2×113⁄4×413⁄4"                                         the spotlight.
This combination: 194.835.88                                         Overall size: 783⁄4×11×931⁄4"
                                                                  This combination: 890.178.27


BILLY/OXBERG Bookcase with panel/glass doors.                  BILLY Bookcase corner with extension units
When you want a lot of storage space in your living room or          With BILLY corner fittings you can build a corner solution using
dining area! Several units create a wide, yet stylish and elegant        the classic bookcase. The fittings will help you to put the shelves
solution with OXBERG glass/panel doors. Display all your finest         at the right angle and make the solution stable. With a height
items and hide away all the clutter.                                  extension unit, the wall surface is utilized maximally, while floor
Overall size: 63×113⁄4×791⁄2"                                        space is cleared. Lots of storage space for booklovers!
This combination: 394.836.05                                         Overall size: 531⁄2/531⁄2×11×931⁄4"

Buying guide
BILLY
Bookcase series


Safety
Secure It! Prevent tip-over
injury. Furniture with included
restraints must be secured to the
wall according to the assembly
instructions.

Different wall materials require
different types of hardware.
Use hardware (sold separately)
suitable for the walls in your
home.

Tempered glass should be
handled with care! A damaged
edge or a scratched surface can
cause the glass to break suddenly.
However, it will only break into
small pieces, never into sharp
fragments.


                          Storage for all occasions and needs
                            BILLY bookcase is a beloved icon that never goes out of style. Thanks
                             to its versatility you can use it in many different ways at home -
                             regardless of whether you store books or everyday items in it. A single
                               unit can be enough, but you can also add more bookcases, extension
                              units and shelves to create a larger and more personal combination.
                            BILLY is available in different heights, widths, and expressions so you
                          can always find a storage solution that suits you and your home!

                           Better and better, day by day
                            BILLY was launched in 1979 and is just as popular today. We're
                             constantly working to make the series even better, more relevant
                        and more useful. Some changes, like new wooden expressions, you
                          see right away. Others take longer to discover, for example that BILLY
                                      is made of high-quality paper foil and that the back panel fixes in
                             place with snap fittings. This makes it easy to assemble and
                            disassemble, so you can bring it when moving and continue to enjoy
                          your BILLY for years.

sections.text:
Secure It! Prevent tip-over
injury. Furniture with included
restraints must be secured to the
wall according to the assembly
instructions.

Different wall materials require
different types of hardware.
Use hardware (sold separately)
suitable for the walls in your
home.

Tempered glass should be
handled with care! A damaged
edge or a scratched surface can
cause the glass to break suddenly.
However, it will only break into
small pieces, never into sharp
fragments.


                          Storage for all occasions and needs
                            BILLY bookcase is a beloved icon that never goes out of style. Thanks
                             to its versatility you can use it in many different ways at home -
                             regardless of whether you store books or everyday items in it. A single
                               unit can be enough, but you can also add more bookcases, extension
                              units and shelves to create a larger and more personal combination.
                            BILLY is available in different heights, widths, and expressions so you
                          can always find a storage solution that suits you and your home!

                           Better and better, day by day
                            BILLY was launched in 1979 and is just as popular today. We're
                             constantly working to make the series even better, more relevant
                        and more useful. Some changes, like new wooden expressions, you
                          see right away. Others take longer to discover, for example that BILLY
                                      is made of high-quality paper foil and that the back panel fixes in
                             place with snap fittings. This makes it easy to assemble and
                            disassemble, so you can bring it when moving and continue to enjoy
                          your BILLY for years.


 You can also use the doors with the        - or the perfect foundation to build on when your library grows.
included panel or put photos, fabric or wallpaper between the          Overall size: 63×11×791⁄2"
glass and the panel. Place the solution in your living room or in        This combination: 790.178.37
the dining area to enjoy beautiful and functional storage.
